post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 167: Social Experiment Mafia!

IF YOU ARE NOT CURRENTLY IN THIS GAME, DO NOT POST
Credits to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123 (among others) for the rule template. This game is BM.

Story
Location: Poorly lit warehouse in the middle of nowhere

Nine people wake up together in a warehouse. The scene suddenly becomes frantic. They all somehow wake up at the same time. None of them know each other. None of them live similar lives. And none of them know what is going on.

The warehouse has poor accommodations. There are nine beds, a couple restrooms, a couple locked doors, a couple windows letting in light, and a water fountain. Other than that, the warehouse is completely empty.

Suddenly a loud voice can be heard. No one knows where it’s coming from.

“Welcome to my little social experiment”, the voice says. “You lot have been hand selected to take part in this test, the results of which will prove invaluable for research”.

Everyone is looking at each other with distrust and uneasiness. “Do not worry. Each of you will be fed, taken care of, and protected from the outside world. However, I cannot guarantee that you are safe from each other. There may even be some among you who seek to eliminate all”.

Accusations are now flying. Fingers are being pointed. Whatever is happening, you are determined to root it out from among you.

[/size]


Rules
  • Read all the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Read the entire OP.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs. Do not play around with exploiting this rule.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderator in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.


Voting/Daykills
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Playernames must be spelled correctly. If you try to conceal a fakevote and a mod or co-mod does not catch it, it will be counted as a real vote for any purposes. For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any..
  • If at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • If at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.


Activity
  • Each day will be 14 days. The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 14 days have passed.
  • If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hangand will proceed to be twilight.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Any night results will be sent after the night deadline.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive an in-game prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 36-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless he/she posts before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (SFGiantsFan) am the Moderator of Game 1XX.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderator. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not post in those colors or in any shades of those colors.
  • Please do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the moderators. If you need to ask if saying something is ok, then do so in your PM.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.


Setup
Move along it’s closed


Alive (6)
  • e_is_cool
  • fdas
  • benjaminsz idomath12345 chess24
  • Thornclaw9000 jeffisepic
  • pandabear10
  • sudzoof


Dead (3)
  • kevinmathz, Barbara Wilson (Vanilla Townie) was strangled D1
  • Kagebaka, Cop Copson (Town Cop) was shot to death N1
  • math_turtle37, Mary Johnson (Vanilla Townie) was beat to death D3


Significant Events
kevinmathz is hung D1
Kagebaka dies N1
No one dies D2
No one dies N2
math_turtle37 is hung D3
No one dies N3


Warnings

Congrats to town for winning!
